author: manunlp
content:
To do some basic interoping LH<>Prysm:
https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/16352
Kurtosis config in the PR description.

Tested with:
- 1 LH prover node +  1 LH verifier node and 1 Prysm verifier node
- 1 Prysm prover node + 1 LH verifier node and 1 Prysm verifier node

cc <@402080271563751435>
